last_debrief: konjam and sandosham finally produced — both needed one recast then fired. poren settled cold. mudiyaadhu fired clean cold. aamaa confirmed still solid. Next: nail naalaikku and poganum in fresh situations; try a thooku/vai dispatch to crack the placement verbs.
status: 8 episodes under-listened (~24 min). Re-listen playlist recommended before new production.
